Hello and welcome to our channel,

We are Reanne and Ben living in Portsmouth, England. We have been together from the age of 15. 
We brought our first house together at 23, got married at 25 and Reanne started her own business at 27. 
We have been wanting to travel the world so
The day has finally come we have sold our business and and our house to explore as much of the world Full Time. 

We created this YouTube channel to share our adventure with everyone who wants to explore but don’t know how. Let us know what you think of our channel so leave a comment we’d love to hear from you x

Join us on our adventures.

videos.title: 60 Best Places of Islamabad | Pakistan
videos.description:
Welcome to our ultimate guide to exploring Islamabad, the vibrant capital city of Pakistan! In this captivating travel vlog, we'll take you on an immersive journey through the heart of Islamabad, uncovering its rich culture, breathtaking sights, and hidden treasures. Whether you're a seasoned traveler or planning your first adventure, this video is your go-to resource for an unforgettable experience in Islamabad.

Join us as we dive into the top attractions that make Islamabad a must-visit destination. Marvel at the stunning architecture of the iconic Faisal Mosque, one of the largest mosques in the world, and soak in the tranquility of Lake View Park, offering picturesque views and recreational activities for all ages.

But our exploration doesn't stop there! We'll also reveal the lesser-known gems and off-the-beaten-path treasures that truly capture the essence of Islamabad. Explore the enchanting Lok Virsa Museum, where you can delve into Pakistan's rich cultural heritage, and wander through the vibrant stalls of Jinnah Super Market, a paradise for foodies and souvenir hunters alike.

To ensure you make the most of your visit, we'll share invaluable travel tips and insights, including the best times to visit, transportation options, and insider recommendations for dining and accommodations. Whether you're seeking adventure, culture, or relaxation, Islamabad has something special in store for you.

So, whether you're planning your next getaway or simply craving some armchair travel inspiration, join us on this unforgettable journey through Islamabad. Don't forget to like, comment, and subscribe for more travel adventures from around the world! Let's embark on an epic adventure together in the enchanting capital city of Islamabad. 🌍✈️🕌

Islamabad is the capital of Pakistan and it is counted among one of the most beautiful cities of the world. It is sometimes counted as second or third most beautiful capital city of the world as well. Travel Touch has a special connection with Islamabad and it is one of our basic topics. We have already presented a video titled as 17 best places of Islamabad in the past but Islamabad has more to offer and that's why we are bringing this video which is presenting 60 best places of Islamabad city. Majority of these places are tourist attractions in Islamabad. We hope this video will add to your knowledge and you will like it. 

Places of Islamabad mentioned in this video include: Faisal Masjid, Daman-e-Koh, Pakistan Monument, Shahdara Valley, Rose & Jasmine Garden, QAU (Quaid-e-Azam University), Golra, Lok Virsa, Melody Food Park, Bari Imam, Rawal Dam, Lake View Park, Aabpara, IIUI (International Islamic University), Sundaymar Dam, Centaurus Mall, Fatima Jinnah Park, Margalla Hills National Park, Shah Allah Ditta Caves, Shakar Parian National Park, Saidpur Village, Pakistan National Council of Arts, Golra Sharif Railway Museum, Pakistan Museum of National History, Kachnar Park, Sir Syed Memorial Museum, Pir Sohawa, Lal Masjid, Japanese Children Park, Bruti Waterfall, Monal Restaurant, Safa Gold Mall, Islamabad Club, Pakistan Museum, Simply Dam, Saudi Pak Tower, Pak Farid Park, Dino Valley, Chattar Park, H-11 Graveyard, Shahpur Dam, Islamabad Airport, Pak China Friendship Center, Bahria Enclave Zoo, National Library of Pakistan, Pakistan Academy of Letters, Jinnah Convention Center, Islamabad Sports Club, Chand Tara Sculpture, Argentina Park, Jinnah Super Market, Open Air Theater, Pine Valley Waterfall, Shumber Waterfall, Nilan Bhotu Valley, Nicholson Monument, Red Zone, Kanwal Jheel, Giga Mall and Kohsar Market.

Let us know your feedback in comments and don't forget to tell us that how many of these places have you visited. 

If you want to see our previous video of 17 best places of Islamabad, here is the link for that:

https://youtu.be/Wtx8wT7TwjM 

Also remember that we have separately created videos about many of places mentioned in this video and you can check out our playlist about Islamabad at this link:

https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLHFcxPIqLrVbbXDrUOKV3n196EePQnGul

videos.title: Kumrat Valley – Thal from Islamabad | Complete Road Information | Day 01
videos.description:
Welcome to @MaTraveller 

This is our 1st day of Kumrat Tour. Kumrat Valley is often called ‘Beauty Queen’. This is the most beautiful valley of Pakistan. 
In this video, I will share with you the complete road detail from the capital Islamabad to Thal. Will also explore the unique wooden mosque in Thal, which is 400 years old. 

00:00 Intro of the Episode
00:56 Traveling via M 1 & M 16
05:22 Traveling Dir-Chitral Road
09:10 Traveling Shringal-Thal Road
11:55 Exploring Wooden Masjid

Our next destinations would be:
Jahaz Banda

videos.title: Things to do in Islamabad | Places to visit in Islamabad|TOP MUST-VISIT PLACES IN ISLAMABAD PAKISTAN
videos.description:
Things to do in Islamabad | Places to visit in Islamabad | TOP MUST-VISIT PLACES IN ISLAMABAD PAKISTAN
🏔️ THE ULTIMATE ISLAMABAD GUIDE 2026 | Top Places for Food, Culture, Fun & Views! 🇵🇰
Assalam u Alaykum everyone! Welcome to the second most beautiful capital in the world! I’m JK, and in today’s vlog, I’m showing you the best things to do in Islamabad. Whether you are a foodie, a history buff, or someone just looking for the best sunset spots, this is the only guide you need.

Islamabad has changed a lot, and I’ve curated the perfect list of must-visit spots for every type of traveler.

📍 What’s in this Vlog?
Timecode
0:00 - Intro
0:43 - Best places for Food & Cafe lovers in Islamabad
2:13 - Top Places for Culture & History enthusiasts
2:46 - Places for Fun, Viewpoints & Hanging Out in Islamabad

If you enjoyed this tour of the capital, please give it a LIKE and COMMENT your favorite spot in Islamabad! Don't forget to SUBSCRIBE for more city guides and travel adventures. Pakistan Zindabaad!!!

For Detail Guide on Dino Valley Watch = https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WMJlri-TEBI

For Detail Guide of Jungle Rainforest Food Court Amazon Mall Watch = https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dI3QQLGx9cc

For Park View City Dancing fountains Detail Guide, Watch = https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jrLCklSA3Rw

For Multi Garden Zoo B-17 detail Guide = https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xX0QVz7uVQE

✨ Highlights of the Guide:

Best Coffee Shops: My top recommendations for caffeine lovers.

Sunset Spots: Where to get the perfect golden hour photo.

Budget Tips: How to enjoy the city without breaking the bank.

Hidden Gems: Places even some locals don't know about!

Islamabad isn't just a city; it’s an experience. Watch the full video to plan your perfect Islamabad itinerary!
